creator: draco@marino.st
text:
benchmarks/wrk has a broken checksum.
At the time of the writing, setting:

GITVERSION= 0-g6fd3ee1 

and then running "make makesum" will allow the port to fetch and build.
However, I don't know if the GITVERSION will need changing after each commit to the master branch.

Fix: 

If the tarball changes after each commit, another scheme is needed for this port!
